message:
chore(beads): close bd-3thu resource_ops harness matrix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3srp","title":"syscall: pidfd_open invalid flags should return EINVAL exactly","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for pidfd_open(getpid(), 1). Add focused ABI regression coverage for the bad-flags contract so flag validation parity stays exact.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:49:41.585377497Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T07:49:41.585377497Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3sws","title":"Conformance: direct execute stdlib_sort fixture cases","description":"Add direct frankenlibc_fixture_exec coverage for stdlib_sort.json cases in the harness alongside existing isolated harness coverage.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T07:40:43.699436003Z","created_by":"SilverHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-18T07:47:37.344628153Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T07:47:37.342704703Z","close_reason":"Added direct execute_fixture_case coverage for stdlib_sort fixtures and verified with rch test/check/clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","stdlib","testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-3tc","title":"Change-point drift policy: BOCPD integration for regime-shift-aware control routing","description":"Critique mapping: #5.

Deliverables:
- Integrate Bayesian change-point detection into routing policy updates.
- Define freeze/escalate policy under detected regime shifts.

Acceptance:
- Synthetic drift fixtures trigger expected regime transitions.
- Non-drift runs remain stable (low false positive rate under budget).

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"2026-02-11 validation pass (BrownCompass): BOCPD drift-policy artifact and gates are complete/consistent. Verified scripts/check_changepoint_drift.sh (PASS) and cargo test -p glibc-rs-harness --test changepoint_drift_test -- --nocapture (7 passed). Coverage includes BOCPD parameter consistency, routing escalation policy, monitor integration, false-positive control targets, and summary checks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"BrownCompass","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:11.505694765Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:41:18.634331851Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:41:18.634307616Z","close_reason":"BOCPD change-point drift artifact/gate/test suite is complete and re-validated (gate pass + harness test pass).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","critique","drift","math"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3tc","depends_on_id":"bd-182","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3tc","depends_on_id":"bd-35a","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-3thu","title":"resource: execute resource_ops.json fixture family through harness matrix","description":"Concrete gap: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/resource_ops_conformance_test.rs currently validates resource fixtures only via the in-process executor. Add isolated harness subprocess execution for tests/conformance/fixtures/resource_ops.json, assert expected_output and host parity in strict/hardened modes, and fix any matrix-path mismatch surfaced by the new coverage.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T04:24:52.702641863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T04:24:52.702641863Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"bd-3thu","title":"resource: execute resource_ops.json fixture family through harness matrix","description":"Concrete gap: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/resource_ops_conformance_test.rs currently validates resource fixtures only via the in-process executor. Add isolated harness subprocess execution for tests/conformance/fixtures/resource_ops.json, assert expected_output and host parity in strict/hardened modes, and fix any matrix-path mismatch surfaced by the new coverage.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T04:24:52.702641863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T12:09:51.470271120Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T12:09:51.467144260Z","close_reason":"Added resource_ops_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix in commit (push above) — dispatches all fixture cases through harness conformance-matrix-case subprocess. Both in-process and subprocess paths green. Gates clean via rch + isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3tp","title":"Math value proof: A/B benchmark each kept module against simpler baseline","description":"Critique mapping: #5 + extreme optimization discipline.

Deliverables:
- For each retained module, provide before/after metrics and behavioral equivalence checks.
- Document opportunity score (impact x confidence / effort) and keep only score>=2.0 candidates.

Acceptance:
- Retained modules have objective value evidence.
- No retained module survives solely by aesthetic/novelty argument.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"2026-02-11 closure (CrimsonCove): math_value_proof_test (8 pass) + gate script. Score formula consistent, retained modules meet threshold, core/monitor modules match governance.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:11.695462569Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:52:42.521959Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:52:42.521959Z","close_reason":"Math value proof operational. 8 harness tests pass. check_math_value_proof.sh validates assessments, scores, and retained module thresholds.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","critique","math","perf"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3tp","depends_on_id":"bd-24x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3tp","depends_on_id":"bd-2wp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3tp","depends_on_id":"bd-f7r","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3u0","title":"Hard-parts workload matrix: map real binaries to required subsystems","description":"Critique mapping: #1 + #4.

Deliverables:
- Curate representative binary matrix (coreutils/python/git/curl/etc) with required subsystem dependencies.
- Use matrix to prioritize rtld/nss/locale/resolver milestones by real-world unblock impact.

Acceptance:
- Every hard-part milestone references at least one blocked workload from matrix.
- Matrix used by bv/priority report for automatic next-task ranking.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"2026-02-11 closure (CrimsonCove): workload_matrix_test (6 pass) + gate script. Workloads have required fields, subsystem impact consistent, milestones reference valid workloads.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:11.032905409Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:54:16.707976Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:54:16.707976Z","close_reason":"Hard-parts workload matrix operational. 6 harness tests pass. check_workload_matrix.sh validates workload definitions, subsystem impact, and milestones.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","e2e","roadmap"]}
 {"id":"bd-3ue8","title":"Conformance: execute math_ops fixture cases","description":"Add direct frankenlibc_fixture_exec coverage for math_ops.json cases in the harness, using numeric tolerance rather than exact string comparison for floating outputs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T06:37:26.365499536Z","created_by":"SilverHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-18T06:43:53.447382761Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T06:43:53.445426066Z","close_reason":"Added direct math_ops fixture executor coverage with numeric tolerance and verified focused harness test/check/clippy through rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","math","testing"]}
